criteria: idea captured with product boundaries and non-goals
architecture keeps core minimal and features modular
Watchtower/rescue sidecar API is narrow, explicit, and auditable
Windows and WSL target handling is explicit and tested
implementation passes focused automated tests
internal testing-bug-debug-fix-retesting loops are recorded in events/issues/tasks
real end-to-end smoke test proves the product works in the intended environment
operator documentation and acceptance evidence exist
no known blocker remains for normal operation
independent plan review by akane completed before implementation
all actionable plan review comments addressed or explicitly accepted
independent final product review by akane completed before exit
all actionable final review comments fixed and retested before exit
worker assignment to lulu is confirmed and reachable for the chosen execution topology
HASHI9 Windows-side implementation and runtime smoke test pass
Zelda exits automatically only when objective evidence satisfies all criteria and Akane has no blocking review comments
safe live acceptance preflight records protected systems, target processes, independent control channel, auth, dynamic route expectations, and rollback plan before real-world actions
real live acceptance uses the deployed product through the intended external/user path, not local bypasses or mock-only checks
products with rescue/restart/supervision/network promises are tested with controlled live off/on or failure/recovery behavior
live failures trigger restore -> evidence -> debug -> fix -> automated retest -> live retest until green
exit requires live evidence from required status/list views, LAN/WSL/Windows perspectives when applicable, health checks, process state, and audit logs

artifacts.reason: orchestrator live smoke evidence added after user challenge
user identified that smoke/final review alone is insufficient for real runtime products

review_policy.rationale: Cross-factory model review: zelda is GPT-family, akane is Claude-family; independent review tends to catch different failure modes.

worker.hashi9_route: no active route found for lulu@HASHI9

code_location.requirement: develop and run on Windows side, not WSL, for stability

roles.product_owner_acceptor: automatic evidence-based exit; user is not final approver

open_questions: Which HASHI9 repo path/branch should be used for Windows-side development and smoke testing?

execution_topology.rule: lulu uses /workzone to edit the HASHI9 Windows repo folder; product is not complete until tests/smoke pass on HASHI9 Windows side.

summary.commit: a56d3ff Harden remote rescue control contracts
summary.final_review: akane approved; no blockers; four LOW future followups
summary.zelda_live_smoke: passed: Windows L3 start/status/logs/audit and L2 403 gate verified by Zelda on 2026-05-15

exit_evidence.reopened_reason: User correctly noted Zelda did not personally run live Watchtower start verification; worker-reported smoke alone is insufficient for exit.
exit_evidence.reopened_issue_resolution: sli-121728730437-abde resolved with orchestrator-run live smoke evidence
exit_evidence.final_exit_reason: Watchtower v1 implemented, focused tests passed, Zelda live Windows smoke passed, Akane plan/final/addendum reviews have no blockers.
